creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Wed, Aug 08, 2007 at 04:42:31PM +0000, Marko Kobal wrote:
> 
> Hi,
> 
> At the list of supported motherboards with FreeBSD/amd64 Project there is no Supermicro X6QTE+ motherboard.
> 
> Could you please add support for this motherboard under FreeBSD/amd64 Project?
> 
> Link to the motherboard:
> 
> http://www.supermicro.com/products/motherboard/Xeon7000/E8501/X6QTE+.cfm
> 
> This an performance board wich should really be supported by FreeBSD/amd64 Project!
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> >Fix:
> 
> 
> >Release-Note:
> >Audit-Trail:
> >Unformatted:

Hey there!

So, if you read the AMD motherboard pages you see that various people reported the results of some tests, are you able to
submit some of that as well? It will surely give people an idea on what does work out of the box and what doesnt :-)

Thanks for submitting this though (And ofcourse for using FreeBSD).

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
